abilities.name: Chasing Fate
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to reduce an amount of damage equal to the turn number.

abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: Lone Rider
abilities.text: This model may not be targeted by the actions of friendly models.

abilities.name: Nemesis (soulstone)
abilities.text: Enemy models within 3" may not drain (soulstone) for their abilities.

actions.name: Scythe
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack was generated by the Charge action, the target gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Reap
triggers.text: Once per activation. Place this model within 3+X", where X is equal to the turn number. Then, place the target into base contact with this model and declare this action again.

actions.name: Revel in Death
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Enemy models within range gain an Injured token.

triggers.name: Uncaring Eternity
triggers.text: Once per game. Summon a friendly unique model that was killed this game into base contact with this model and set its health to 3.

actions.name: Ride With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target another friendly model of lower Sz. Move this model up to 5". Then, if this action targeted another friendly model, place the friendly model into base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Soulfire
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)3" must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or be dealt 2 damage.
